name: Greg Proops
bio: Greg Proops is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and improviser best known for his work on the British and American versions of Whose Line Is It Anyway?. He built his career on the San Francisco and international stand-up circuits and is known for fast, erudite, reference-heavy material. Since 2010 he has hosted the live podcast The Smartest Man in the World.

timeline.ev: Launches stand-up career in the San Francisco Bay Area
Joins the original UK Whose Line Is It Anyway?
Appears on the US Whose Line Is It Anyway?
Begins the podcast The Smartest Man in the World

accolades: Regular on the UK and US versions of Whose Line Is It Anyway?
Host of the long-running podcast The Smartest Man in the World

specials.t: The Smartest Man in the World
